hero.title: Your LLM cost
hero.subtitle: Track every dollar spent on LLM inference in real-time across all your providers. See Claude Code work from the inside.
hero.trustBadge: No credit card · Open source agent · SOC 2 in progress

features.heading: Built like a cockpit. Not like a dashboard.

multiProvider.label: Multi-Provider
multiProvider.title: All providers, one view
multiProvider.description: Anthropic, OpenAI, Groq, Mistral, xAI. Track usage, tokens, latency, and cost in real-time across all your LLM providers.

radar.label: Claude Code Radar
radar.title: Real-time agent trace
radar.description: Visualize the main agent, sub-agents, files accessed, tools called. Context window usage shown like a fuel gauge.

budgets.label: Budgets & Alerts
budgets.title: Set limits, stay safe
budgets.description: Define budgets by provider, model, or workflow. Get alerts at 75/90/100% thresholds via email, Slack, or webhook.

mobile.label: Anywhere Access
mobile.title: Desktop + Mobile PWA
mobile.description: Full cockpit on desktop, alerts on mobile. Install as a PWA, works offline, native push notifications.

pricingTeaser.label: // Pricing
pricingTeaser.heading: Start free. Upgrade when ready.
pricingTeaser.description: Free plan includes 1 provider, 1 budget, and 30 days of history. Pro unlocks everything for 4.99 EUR/month.

finalCta.heading: Ready to track your LLM costs?
finalCta.description: Sign up in 30 seconds. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: LLM cost observability platform. Built in France, operated in Europe.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple, transparent pricing. Start free, upgrade when you need more.
pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: Start free. Upgrade when you need unlimited providers and real-time features.

apiKeys.noKeysDetail: Create one to integrate Claude Code, n8n, or Python SDK

hero.title: About Costwave
hero.subtitle: Costwave unifies AI cost tracking.
hero.mission: You use 5 AI providers. You have 5 dashboards. We make it 1.

why.problem: You use Anthropic for Claude, OpenAI for GPT, Groq for fast inference, Mistral and Google AI. Costs are fragmented. Tracking is manual. Budgets are impossible to manage.
why.solution: Costwave aggregates everything. One unified dashboard. Real-time costs. Automatic budget alerts. Native Claude Code integration.

step1.title: Connect your providers
step1.description: 1-click OAuth or paste your API keys. Works with Anthropic, OpenAI, Groq, Mistral, xAI.

step2.title: See costs in real-time
step2.description: Unified dashboard. All providers. All models. Tokens, latency, cost, by period and workflow.

step3.title: Set budgets and alerts
step3.description: Limits by provider, model, or workflow. Alerts at 75%, 90%, 100% thresholds via email, Slack, or webhook.

step4.title: Ingest API and Claude Code
step4.description: Track your personal usage via the Python SDK. Visualize your Claude Code agent activity in the Radar view.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Costwave is MIT licensed. The code is auditable. You can self-host it on your own infrastructure.
openSource.verifyCode: You don't have to trust us. You can verify the code.

hero.title: Security
hero.tagline: Your API keys, encrypted at rest

passwords.title: User passwords
passwords.description: Your password is hashed with scrypt before storage. We never store plaintext passwords.

providerKeys.title: Provider API keys
providerKeys.description: Your provider API keys are encrypted server-side using AES-256-GCM. The encryption key is derived from a server pepper using Argon2id. Each encryption uses a unique IV. Plaintext keys are never stored.

costwaveKeys.title: Costwave API keys
costwaveKeys.description: Ingest API keys are hashed with bcrypt before storage.

openSource.title: Auditable code
openSource.description: Costwave is open source. You can audit the cryptographic implementation.
openSource.verifyCode: You don't have to trust us. You can verify the code.

selfHostable.title: Self-hosting
selfHostable.description: Deploy Costwave on your own infrastructure. Full control over your data. No vendor lock-in.

compliance.title: Compliance V2
compliance.v2Roadmap: GDPR compliance and SOC 2 Type II certification are planned for V2. Costwave is currently in beta.
